textByHash.53ddbdf6702e8d62ef2d63855caf1230a6050568: Greetings! Have you come to gaze in rapture at the natural beauty of Falador's parkland?
textByHash.6382c3bb2992937a366fbbe88e052ce4ac5c7b3c: Have you come to play music to me?
textByHash.65ffdb5eb4f07961a3c5fc834bbaf3352e02d2d5: Then you must have come to gaze in rapture at the natural beauty of Falador's parkland!
textByHash.78fb28ede93cf1adb292d5b7b580ac9aa04c75f3: Come back to me soon and we can talk again about trees!
textByHash.b64b491ffe6ee2b8265883cedbbec647d0da9b97: Trees! I do so love trees! And flowers! And squirrels!
textByHash.cc28438f70d0b043aa4e06c11e047bda982aa43b: Thank you, I love that song!
textByHash.edfc27a5d9db0065019a22a13b0a054b154ec430: Select the song I asked you to play, and speak to me again.
